message.content:
@startuml
title Edit pet owner details

actor Vet_Central
participant "petOwner_dialog" as dialog
database Database
participant "GoogleMapAPI" as mapAPI

activate dialog

1: extract person Id from routes
dialog -> dialog: 1 extract person Id from routes

2: fetchUserDetail(personId)
dialog -> Database: 2 fetchUserDetail(personId)

3: (personDetails)
Database --> dialog: 3 (personDetails)

4: setState(personDetails and disable editable form field)
dialog -> dialog: 4 setState(personDetails and disable editable form field)

opt [if person detail has address]
5: geoCodeByPlaceId(place id from db)
dialog -> mapAPI: 5 geoCodeByPlaceId(place id from db)

6: (formatted_address)
mapAPI --> dialog: 6 (formatted_address)
end

7: render()
dialog --> Vet_Central: 7 render()

deactivate dialog

@enduml
